title: His Nibs
actors: Charles 'Chic' Sale, Colleen Moore, Joseph J. Dowling
plot: At the Slippery Elm Picture Palace, an old-fashioned movie house, various comical rural types are seen: theater owner "Theo Bender" (also known as "His Nibs"); his son, "Elmer Bender;" newspaper editor "Mr. Percifer;" "Wally Craw,...
